resources.string: Welcome to WuWa Companion
Choose your theme and data mode. Both choices can be changed later in Settings.
Theme controls appearance only and works independently from the selected data mode.
Finish setup
Save the selected theme and data mode, then open WuWa Companion.
Updated to version %1$s
The application update was installed successfully. App and database versions continue to update independently.
WuWa Companion was updated from version %1$s to %2$s. Open the release notes for the complete list of changes.
Continue
Release notes
Back
The app checks the repository silently at startup. Text data and optional image assets are installed according to your selected data mode.
Control appearance, choose how much data the app downloads, and review installed versions.
Data mode
Choose between a lightweight information-only experience and richer cards with optional images.
Minimalist
Images
Downloads and displays the text database only. Previously downloaded images remain private but are hidden.
Downloads the text database and the optional verified image package when one is published.
Checks the live database manifest, securely downloads newer verified text data, and installs it without replacing the APK.
Images mode is selected. Installed image package: %1$s
Minimalist mode is selected. Optional image packages will not be downloaded.
A download button appears only when the repository publishes an APK with a newer Android version code.
Checking
Downloading
Updated
Version %1$s available
Ready to install
Not published yet
Could not check
Download failed
Package information incomplete
Update app first
Downloading database
Downloading image assets
Downloading application update
Update selected data
Retry data check
Download version %1$s
Install update
Download, verify, and install the text database plus images when Images mode is selected.
Check the repository for newer text data and, when selected, a newer image package.
Retry the online data-manifest check.
Download and verify the newer universal APK from this release channel.
Open Android’s package installer for the verified APK.
No new selected data update was found.
A newer app version is required before this database package can be installed.
The data update check could not be completed. Check your connection and try again.
The database update could not be downloaded, verified, or installed.
The text database is usable, but its optional image package could not be installed. It will be checked again later.
The application update could not be downloaded or verified.
Database version %1$s was installed successfully.
Image package version %1$s was installed successfully.
No compatible image package is currently published. Text information remains available.
Minimalist mode selected. The app will use text information only.
Images mode selected. Checking for the optional image package.
The downloaded APK is no longer available. Download the update again.
Allow this app to install updates, then return to continue.
No application could open this link.
Checking whether this version publishes an image package. Images remains unavailable until the check completes.
Images support is not available for this version. The Images choice will be enabled automatically when a verified image package is published.
All
No summary is available for this entry yet.
Database not installed
Open Updates and install the current database. The Library will reload automatically when installation finishes.
No matching entries
Try another name, type, category, or keyword.
No entries in this category
The installed database does not currently contain records for this category.
